sensitivity: Variable by detection target and view type; for caries lesion-level sensitivity: bitewing 72.8%, periapical 70.6%, panoramic 68.3%; for aided clinical reading (bitewing caries): 80.3%
specificity: Variable by detection target and view type; for caries case-level specificity (aided clinical reading, bitewing): 85.7%
auc: wAFROC AUC for caries lesion-level (aided): bitewing 0.848, periapical 0.814, panoramic 0.615
intended_use: VELMENI for DENTISTS (V4D) is a concurrent-read, computer-assisted detection software intended to assist dentists in the clinical detection of dental caries, fillings/restorations, fixed prostheses, a
intended_use_full: VELMENI for DENTISTS (V4D) is a concurrent-read, computer-assisted detection software intended to assist dentists in the clinical detection of dental caries, fillings/restorations, fixed prostheses, and implants in digital bitewing, periapical, and panoramic radiographs of permanent teeth in patients 15 years of age or older. This device provides additional information for dentists in examining radiographs of patients' teeth. This device is not intended as a replacement for a complete examination by the dentist or their clinical judgment that considers other relevant information from the image, patient history, or actual in vivo clinical assessment. Final diagnoses and patient treatment plans are the responsibility of the dentist.
target_condition: Dental caries, restorations, fixed prostheses, and implants
ground_truth: Consensus labels of three US licensed dentists; non-consensus labels adjudicated by an oral radiologist
other_metrics: Dice coefficient for lesion segmentation (caries): bitewing 81.96%, periapical 82.77%, panoramic 77.07%; False positives per image mean (caries): bitewing 0.24, periapical 0.27, panoramic 0.33; Case-level sensitivity for multiple features across three radiograph types reported in Table 3
